title: Common types
description: Shared type definitions referenced by message schemas.

DeviceID.title: DeviceID
DeviceID.description: Stable identifier for a HID device. Format: VID_<hex>_PID_<hex>[_<serial>].

InputEvent.title: InputEvent
InputEvent.description: A single hardware event coming from a HID device.

input_id.description: Logical identifier of the input within the device (e.g. 'K1', 'ENC1').

timestamp_ms.description: Unix epoch in milliseconds when the event was captured by the daemon.

Action.title: Action
Action.description: An executable action bound to an input.

type.description: Action type. Built-ins are well-known; plugin actions use 'plugin.<plugin_id>.<action_id>'.

Binding.title: Binding
Binding.description: Maps an input on a specific device to an action.

Device.title: Device
Device.description: A HID device known to the daemon. Returned by list_devices.

vendor_id.description: USB Vendor ID as a 4-digit hexadecimal string (lowercase or uppercase, no '0x' prefix).

product_id.description: USB Product ID as a 4-digit hexadecimal string (lowercase or uppercase, no '0x' prefix).

manufacturer.description: Manufacturer string from the HID descriptor. May be missing on cheap/clone devices.

product.description: Product name string from the HID descriptor.

serial_number.description: Serial number string from the HID descriptor. Not all HID devices expose one.

path.description: OS-opaque path used by the HID library to (re)open the device. Format varies per OS; clients should treat it as an opaque token.
